results.text: Blinding Snowstorm: Test Fortitude DR14 or take d4 damage per hour.
Freezing Mist: Visibility obscured. Stealth advantage today.
Ice Shards: Rain of blades. Test Swift DR12 or take d4 damage.
Aurora's Blessing: Degraded armour is miraculously repaired.
Frozen Ground: Icy fissures. Test Swift DR12 to avoid falling.
Silent Night: Communication impossible. Footsteps leave no echo.
